name: @taylorsatula/pi-hud
description_en: Ambient HUD injected into the model's context on every LLM call. Live briefing notes (time, context budget, git, cwd) that refresh as assistant messages complete — kept off the transcript and out of the user's view.
description_zh: 注入到每个 LLM 调用模型上下文中的环境 HUD。实时简报笔记（时间、上下文预算、git、cwd）在助手消息完成时刷新 — 保留在转录之外且不在用户视图中
